Home › Brevard County › West Melbourne › Top-Rated & Safe

Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in West Melbourne

These 16 West Melbourne restaurants pass Florida health inspections with an A grade and earn strong diner ratings — a clean kitchen and a meal people love. Sorted by rating.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • A 100 U
    UMAMI RESTAURANT & SUSHI BAR Sushi ★ 4.7 (1122) West Melbourne · Brevard County VeganVeg +5 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 97 H
    HAMPTON INN AND SUITES BY HILTON - WEST MELBOURNE Other ★ 4.7 (919) West Melbourne · Brevard County Inspected Aug 2025
